problem_title: Onboarding evidence becomes difficult to preserve
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a complete and auditable record of corporate onboarding decisions across multiple KYC and KYB providers. This fragmentation slows due diligence workflows and weakens the traceability needed for regulatory review and internal audits.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results, corporate data, reviewer actions and decision logs into one traceable workflow for compliance teams managing audit-ready corporate onboarding records.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes KYC and KYB provider outputs into risk-based reviews, case decisions, evidence retention and audit-ready documentation for corporate onboarding workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures onboarding by connecting KYC and KYB provider outputs into connected workflows with linked customer, company and risk data for clear, auditable corporate onboarding review.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates onboarding by routing identity, company and ownership checks into risk-based review paths, creating cases, logging decisions, and preserving an audit trail for all onboarding actions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by maintaining decision logs, case histories, provider results and supporting documents to support audit-ready records for KYB and corporate due diligence reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into one compliance workflow without disrupting existing systems or replacing provider functionalities.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but complements them by turning their outputs into structured, auditable onboarding workflows and enhanced compliance control.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence for corporate onboarding
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured evidence and workflows for defensible onboarding decisions.
